_note: Curated upskill resource packs for 5 NZ industries. Replace placeholder content with real, verified resources before launch. Structure must match UpskillPack type in UpskillSection.tsx.

Finance & Accounting.headline: Finance is one of AI's fastest-moving frontiers — but human judgment, client relationships, and regulatory knowledge remain firmly yours.

youtube.title: Accounting Stuff
youtube.why: Clear, practical breakdowns of accounting concepts and how AI tools are changing the profession.

youtube.title: CFI Education
youtube.why: Financial modelling, valuation, and FP&A skills — the high-value work AI can't replace.

youtube.title: How I Got Xero to Reconcile Itself with AI (Saved Hours of Bookkeeping)
youtube.why: Real workflow demo — an AI agent logging into Xero and auto-reconciling accounts (Aug 2025).

courses.title: Financial Analysis and Reporting
courses.why: Builds the analytical skills that sit above what AI can automate.

courses.title: Excel and AI for Finance Professionals
courses.why: Practical AI tool use for finance workflows — the upskill employers expect.

nz_specific.title: CA ANZ Learning & Events
nz_specific.why: NZ-specific CPD and AI in finance content from the NZ professional body.

nz_specific.title: Careers NZ — Finance Pathways
nz_specific.why: NZ salary data and career pathways for finance roles.

quick_wins: Set up a free ChatGPT or Claude account and practice summarising financial reports
Spend 30 minutes on the CA ANZ AI in Finance learning page
Identify one repetitive task in your week that could be partially automated — and research a tool for it

community.name: School of AI
community.description: AI for finance and business professionals — active community, free to join

community.name: The AI Advantage
community.description: Practical AI workflows for professionals — active daily discussions

Healthcare.headline: AI is entering healthcare fast — but the clinical judgment, empathy, and hands-on care that define the best practitioners are exactly what patients still need humans for.

youtube.title: Medmastery
youtube.why: Clinical education content relevant to keeping skills sharp as AI handles more documentation.

youtube.title: AI in Medicine — NEJM
youtube.why: Real clinical AI case studies from the New England Journal of Medicine.

youtube.title: AI in Healthcare 2025: Breakthroughs for Your Practice
youtube.why: Covers diagnostic AI, clinical note automation, and what it means for frontline clinicians (Dec 2025).

courses.title: AI in Healthcare
courses.why: Understand what AI can and can't do in clinical settings — essential for NZ health workers.

courses.title: Health Informatics for Better and Safer Healthcare
courses.why: Digital health literacy — increasingly expected in NZ clinical roles.

nz_specific.title: Health Workforce NZ — Development Programmes
nz_specific.why: NZ government workforce development and training pathways for health workers.

nz_specific.title: Careers NZ — Healthcare
nz_specific.why: NZ healthcare career pathways and training requirements.

quick_wins: Read Te Whatu Ora's latest digital health strategy (free, 20 minutes)
Identify one documentation task that AI tools could speed up for you
Explore one digital health tool your workplace hasn't yet adopted

community.name: School of AI
community.description: General AI upskilling community with a growing healthcare cohort

community.name: Hivebrite (Healthcare Associations)
community.description: Platform used by NZ and Australian medical associations for professional development communities — check your specific body

Marketing & Advertising.headline: AI has already changed marketing faster than almost any other industry — but strategy, brand voice, and the ability to direct AI tools intelligently are your strongest cards.

youtube.title: Neil Patel
youtube.why: Practical digital marketing strategy, SEO, and AI tool use for marketers.

youtube.title: Marketing Against the Grain (HubSpot)
youtube.why: How top marketers are using AI to scale output without losing brand quality.

youtube.title: Google Marketing Live 2025 Highlights — New AI Tools and Ads Updates
youtube.why: All the AI marketing tools announced at Google Marketing Live 2025 — essential for any digital marketer.

courses.title: AI for Marketing
courses.why: Practical AI tools for marketing workflows — the skills NZ employers now expect.

courses.title: Digital Marketing Specialization
courses.why: Strategic grounding that differentiates you from AI-only execution.

nz_specific.title: Marketing Association NZ — Training
nz_specific.why: NZ-specific marketing training and AI in marketing content from the industry body.

nz_specific.title: Careers NZ — Marketing
nz_specific.why: NZ salary benchmarks and pathway options for marketing careers.

quick_wins: Set up a free Claude or ChatGPT account and write three different ad variations for a real campaign
Spend 1 hour exploring one AI marketing tool (Jasper, Copy.ai, or Canva AI)
Identify which part of your current role takes the most time — find one AI tool that could speed it up

community.name: The AI Advantage
community.description: Practical AI for marketers — workflows, tool reviews, and active peer discussion

community.name: Kajabi Communities
community.description: Several NZ and Australian marketing professionals host paid communities here — search by your specialty

Technology.headline: Irony of ironies — the technology sector is among the most AI-exposed. But the workers who understand AI deeply, and can direct it, are in the highest demand NZ has ever seen for tech skills.

youtube.title: Fireship
youtube.why: Fast, practical breakdowns of AI tools, coding trends, and what tech workers actually need to know.

youtube.title: Andrej Karpathy
youtube.why: Deep technical understanding of AI/LLMs from one of the field's leading voices.

youtube.title: GitHub Copilot vs Cursor — Best AI Coding Assistant in 2025?
youtube.why: Hands-on comparison of the two dominant AI coding tools — decide which one fits your workflow.

courses.title: Machine Learning Specialization
courses.why: The definitive foundation course — understanding AI at the level that makes you direct it, not fear it.

courses.title: GitHub Copilot for Developers
courses.why: The AI tool most likely to change your daily workflow as a developer.

nz_specific.title: NZTech — Training and Development
nz_specific.why: NZ tech industry body with workforce development resources and AI working groups.

nz_specific.title: Careers NZ — Technology
nz_specific.why: NZ tech career pathways, salary benchmarks, and in-demand skills.

quick_wins: Spend one day building something with a new AI tool or API you haven't used before
Read the latest AI index from Stanford (free, focus on the labour market section)
Identify the one skill in your stack most at risk and spend one hour on a relevant Coursera module

community.name: School of AI
community.description: AI and software development community — active threads on tools, careers, and upskilling

community.name: The AI Advantage
community.description: Practical AI implementation for technical professionals — daily activity

Education.headline: AI can generate content and answer questions — but it can't build the relationships, read a classroom, or adapt to a student the way a skilled teacher can.

youtube.title: Sal Khan — Khanmigo and AI in Education
youtube.why: The leading voice on AI in education — practical and thoughtful, not fearful.

youtube.title: Dr Philippa Hardman — Future of Learning
youtube.why: Research-based insights on how AI is actually changing teaching and learning.

youtube.title: Google for Education 2025: 150+ AI Updates Transforming the Classroom
youtube.why: Comprehensive overview of every AI update Google shipped for classrooms in 2025 (Dec 2025).

courses.title: AI for Education (free short course)
courses.why: Practical ways to use AI as a teaching tool, not a threat.

courses.title: Teaching with AI
courses.why: Classroom-specific AI integration skills — what NZ schools are starting to ask for.

nz_specific.title: CORE Education — Digital Fluency
nz_specific.why: NZ's leading education digital fluency provider — AI in education content specific to the NZ curriculum.

nz_specific.title: Careers NZ — Education
nz_specific.why: NZ teaching career pathways, registration requirements, and professional development.

quick_wins: Try using ChatGPT or Claude to differentiate one lesson plan — compare the result to your own
Explore CORE Education's free AI in education resources for NZ teachers
Identify one admin or marking task you could use AI to speed up this week

community.description: Educators using AI for content, lesson planning, and professional development

community.name: Hivebrite (Education Institutions)
community.description: Platform used by NZ universities and polytechs for alumni and professional communities — check your institution
